image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Your phone battery works by shuttling lithium ions between two electrodes.
Context visual: When charging, lithium ions move from the positive electrode to the negative one.
Escalation visual: Discharging? The process flips! Ions travel back to release energy.
Evidence visual: This movement creates a flow of electrons, powering your device!
Payoff visual: So, next time you charge, remember those tiny ions at work.
Cta visual: Curious about more tech secrets? Like and follow for more!
